title: Collector R. Sadheesh leads review meeting on illicit arrack and narcotics control
summary: District Collector R. Sadheesh chaired a weekly NCORD review on May 14, assessing village-level prohibitive measures and inter-department coordination against illicit arrack and narcotics in Dharmapuri.

title: Sowmiya Anbumani of PMK wins Dharmapuri assembly seat
summary: PMK's Sowmiya Anbumani has won the Dharmapuri assembly seat in the 2026 election, polling 93,713 votes and defeating her TVK challenger by a margin of 20,896 votes.

title: AIADMK-PMK alliance wins four of five seats in Dharmapuri district
summary: It was a bittersweet verdict for the AIADMK-PMK alliance in Dharmapuri district, with the combine winning four of the five assembly seats while losing Pennagaram narrowly to TVK.

title: K.P. Anbalagan retains Palacode for record sixth term
summary: Veteran K.P. Anbalagan has retained the Palacode constituency for a record sixth consecutive term, cementing his hold over the Dharmapuri political landscape.

title: AIADMK wins Paapireddipatti by 42,216 votes; V. Sampathkumar takes Harur
summary: AIADMK swept Paapireddipatti by a 42,216 vote margin, while V. Sampathkumar won the Harur reserved seat by 3,329 votes in Dharmapuri district.

title: Awareness campaigns on substance abuse to be held in Dharmapuri schools and colleges
summary: The district administration has cleared a series of awareness campaigns on substance-abuse hazards to be conducted across all Dharmapuri schools and colleges through May and June.
